217/51: manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')]#[['Word']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization"})
217/52:
# Create Customer Order Based on Categorization Filter Order
cat_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','proc_order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization"})

# Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('proc_order',axis=1)])

# Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

# Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]

# Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).

final_df = pd.concat([
    consolidated_notes,
    notes_from_def])

# Merge in Sub Processes
word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})

# Include Process.
sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')

final_df = pd.concat([
    final_df,
    sub_processes])

final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
#final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
#final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

# Sorting
# Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
# Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
# Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 

# Merge in Category Filter
final_df = final_df.merge(cat_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')

final_df.sort_values(['Process','CAT_ORDER','Word'],inplace=True)

218/7:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

from objects_manual import object_dict
object_dict.keys()

df = pd.DataFrame(object_dict.values())
df['key'] = object_dict.keys()

final_df = pd.DataFrame()

for item in df[df['publish']==1]['key']:
    temp = object_dict[item]
    temp_df = pd.DataFrame(temp['python_object'],columns=['Word'])
    temp_df['Categorization'] = temp['Categorization']
    temp_df['Process'] = temp['Process']
    final_df = pd.concat([final_df,temp_df])    

final_df['Order'] = final_df.groupby(['Process']).cumcount()+1
final_df['Categorization'] = np.where(final_df['Categorization']=='Process','Process Step',final_df['Categorization'])
final_df[['Process','Categorization','Word','Order']].to_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx',index=False)
final_df
217/58:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

# Import Google Sheet Notes
notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')
# Import Google Sheet Definition
definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

# Import Manual File, which is generated from Function, which uses OBJECTS_MANUAL.PY  - Possibly to be replaced by Github file..
manual_object_df= pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')
217/59:
# Create Customer Order Based on Categorization Filter Order
cat_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})

# Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('proc_order',axis=1)])

# Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

# Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]

# Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).

final_df = pd.concat([
    consolidated_notes,
    notes_from_def])

# Merge in Sub Processes
word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})

# Include Process.
sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')

final_df = pd.concat([
    final_df,
    sub_processes])

final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
#final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
#final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

# Sorting
# Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
# Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
# Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 

# Merge in Category Filter
final_df = final_df.merge(cat_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')

final_df.sort_values(['Process','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)

217/78:
# Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])

# Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

# Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]

# Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).

final_df = pd.concat([
    consolidated_notes,
    notes_from_def])

# Merge in Sub Processes
word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})

# Include Process.
sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')

final_df = pd.concat([
    final_df,
    sub_processes])

final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
#final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
#final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

# Sorting
# Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
# Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
# Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 

# Merge in Process  Filter
proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')

# Merge in Word Order.
final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Categorization','Word'],how='left')

final_df.sort_values(['Process','proc_order','word_order','Word'],inplace=True)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

from objects_manual import object_dict
object_dict.keys()

df = pd.DataFrame(object_dict.values())
df['key'] = object_dict.keys()

final_df = pd.DataFrame()

for item in df[df['publish']==1]['key']:
    temp = object_dict[item]
    temp_df = pd.DataFrame(temp['python_object'],columns=['Word'])
    temp_df['Categorization'] = temp['Categorization']
    temp_df['Process'] = temp['Process']
    final_df = pd.concat([final_df,temp_df])    

final_df['Order'] = final_df.groupby(['Process']).cumcount()+1
final_df['Categorization'] = np.where(final_df['Categorization']=='Process','Process Step',final_df['Categorization'])
final_df[['Process','Categorization','Word','Order']].to_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx',index=False)
final_df

    notes_from_def])

# Merge in Sub Processes
word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})

# Include Process.
sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')

final_df = pd.concat([
    final_df,
    sub_processes])

final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
#final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
#final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

# Sorting
# Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
# Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
# Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 

# Merge in Process  Filter
proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')

# Merge in Word Order.
final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Categorization','Word'],how='left')

final_df.sort_values(['Process','proc_order','word_order','Word'],inplace=True)
217/91: final_df[final_df['Word']=='Feature Engineering']
217/92: final_df[final_df['Process']=='Machine Learning Lifecycle']

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

from objects_manual import object_dict
object_dict.keys()

df = pd.DataFrame(object_dict.values())
df['key'] = object_dict.keys()

final_df = pd.DataFrame()

for item in df[df['publish']==1]['key']:
    temp = object_dict[item]
    temp_df = pd.DataFrame(temp['python_object'],columns=['Word'])
    temp_df['Categorization'] = temp['Categorization']
    temp_df['Process'] = temp['Process']
    final_df = pd.concat([final_df,temp_df])    

final_df['Order'] = final_df.groupby(['Process']).cumcount()+1
final_df['Categorization'] = np.where(final_df['Categorization']=='Process','Process Step',final_df['Categorization'])
#final_df[['Process','Categorization','Word','Order']].to_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx',index=False)
final_df

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if not notes_df:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if not definition_df:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if not manual_object_df:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

    
generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df):

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if not notes_df:

        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]

        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])

    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred.

    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})

    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])

    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,

    # Include Process.

    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)

        final_df,
        sub_processes])

    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred.

    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})

    return final_df#.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

import datetime

    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

    
d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

# Import Google Sheet Notes
notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')
# Import Google Sheet Definition
definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

227/2:
def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

    
d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)

    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if len(notes_df)==0:

        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])

        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])

    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()

    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')

    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]

    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])

    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})

    return final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1)

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''


    
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
    
    
    return 

    
d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''


    
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

    
d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')
230/27: d.groupby(['Process','Categorization']).size()

231/2:
def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''


    
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

    
d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()
    
    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

    # Also, include any Item in the Consolidated sheet that is a Process Step. 
    process_list.extend(consolidated_notes[consolidated_notes['Categorization']=='Process Step']['Word'].unique().tolist())
    process_list = list(set(process_list))

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

# Import Google Sheet Notes
notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')
# Import Google Sheet Definition
definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')
# Import Manual File, which is generated from Function, which uses OBJECTS_MANUAL.PY  - Possibly to be replaced by Github file..
manual_object_df= pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')
233/2:
def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

    # Also, include any Item in the Consolidated sheet that is a Process Step. 
    process_list.extend(consolidated_notes[consolidated_notes['Categorization']=='Process Step']['Word'].unique().tolist())
    process_list = list(set(process_list))

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')
233/3: d.groupby(['Process','Categorization']).size()

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD

        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()

        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])

        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])

235/49:
def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

    # Also, include any Item in the Consolidated sheet that is a Process Step. 
    process_list.extend(consolidated_notes[consolidated_notes['Categorization']=='Process Step']['Word'].unique().tolist())
    process_list = list(set(process_list))

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df,'/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/knowledge_base.xlsx')
knowledge_base_df = d.copy()

228/1:
def manual_object_df(export_location=None):
    
    '''
    
    '''

    if not export_location:
        export_location = '/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx'

    df = pd.DataFrame(object_dict.values())
    df['key'] = object_dict.keys()
    
    final_df = pd.DataFrame()
    
    for item in df[df['publish']==1]['key']:
        temp = object_dict[item]
        temp_df = pd.DataFrame(temp['python_object'],columns=['Word'])
        temp_df['Categorization'] = temp['Categorization']
        temp_df['Process'] = temp['Process']
        final_df = pd.concat([final_df,temp_df])    
    
    final_df['Order'] = final_df.groupby(['Process']).cumcount()+1
    final_df['Categorization'] = np.where(final_df['Categorization']=='Process','Process Step',final_df['Categorization'])
    final_df[['Process','Categorization','Word','Order']].to_excel(export_location,index=False)

        final_df = pd.concat([final_df,temp_df])

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.append("/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/d_py_functions")

# Update Manual Parameter List
from daily_etl_folder_mgmt import manual_object_df,generate_knowledgebase

manual_object_df()

# Import Google Sheet Notes
notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

# Import Google Sheet Notes

241/3:

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

    # Also, include any Item in the Consolidated sheet that is a Process Step. 
    process_list.extend(consolidated_notes[consolidated_notes['Categorization']=='Process Step']['Word'].unique().tolist())
    process_list = list(set(process_list))

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

244/3:

def generate_knowledgebase(
    notes_df=None,
    definition_df=None,
    manual_object_df=None,
    export_location=None):

    '''
    Process Utilized to Combine Notes/ Definitions and Logic into Knowledge Base, which is utilized to Create, Processes, Parameters.

    Parameters:
        notes_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Notes from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        definition_df (dataframe): Dataframe containing Definitions from Google. Default is none and it will pull directly from Google.
        manual_object_df (dataframe): Dataframe containining Dataframe of Parameters, generated from Python Process _____, which converts lists in objects_manual.py.
        export_location(str): Name of File to export excel file to. If Blank, returns nothing

    Returns:
        dataframe
        excel_file

    date_created:02-Jul-26
    date_last_modified: 02-Jul-26
    classification:TBD
    sub_classification:TBD
    usage:
        d = generate_knowledgebase(notes_df,definition_df,manual_object_df)
        d = generate_knowledgebase()
 
    '''
    if len(notes_df)==0:
        notes_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSQF2lNc4WPeTRQ_VzWPkqSZp4RODFkbap8AqmolWp5bKoMaslP2oRVVG21x2POu_JcbF1tGRcBgodu/pub?output=csv')

    if len(definition_df)==0:
        definition_df = pd.read_csv('https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQq1-3cTas8DCWBa2NKYhVFXpl8kLaFDohg0zMfNTAU_Fiw6aIFLWfA5zRem4eSaGPa7UiQvkz05loW/pub?output=csv')

    if len(manual_object_df)==0:
        manual_object_df = pd.read_excel('/Users/derekdewald/Documents/Python/Github_Repo/Streamlit/Data/object_manual_published.xlsx')

    # Combine Notes from Google and Notes Extract from Manual List
    consolidated_notes = pd.concat([notes_df,manual_object_df.drop('Order',axis=1)])
    
    # Take all Processes from Notes, so we can extract Definitions
    process_list = consolidated_notes['Process'].unique().tolist()

    # Also, include any Item in the Consolidated sheet that is a Process Step. 
    process_list.extend(consolidated_notes[consolidated_notes['Categorization']=='Process Step']['Word'].unique().tolist())
    process_list = list(set(process_list))

    # Extract Definitions to include into Consolidated Notes.
    notes_from_def = definition_df[definition_df['Process'].isin(process_list)][['Process','Categorization','Word','Definition']]
    
    # Create a Consolidated notes list (Before Incorporating Definitions).
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        consolidated_notes,
        notes_from_def])
    
    # Merge in Sub Processes
    word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
    sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
    #sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
    # Include Process.
    
    sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
    sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
    sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
    sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')
    
    final_df = pd.concat([
        final_df,
        sub_processes])
    
    final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
    final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
    final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
    #final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
    #final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)
    
    # Sorting
    # Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
    # Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
    # Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 
    
    # Merge in Process  Filter
    proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
    final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')
    
    # Merge in Word Order.
    final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')
    
    final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
    final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)

    if export_location:
        final_df.to_excel(export_location,index=False)
       
    return final_df

word_list = final_df['Word'].unique().tolist()
sub_processes = final_df[(final_df['Process'].isin(word_list))]
#sub_processes = sub_processes.drop(['Categorization'],axis=1).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Process':'Word','Definition':"Definition"})
# Include Process.

sub_processes['Definition'] = sub_processes['Word'].fillna("") + ": " + sub_processes['Definition'].fillna('')
sub_processes['Word'] = sub_processes['Process']
sub_processes.drop('Process',axis=1,inplace=True)
sub_processes = sub_processes.merge(final_df[['Word','Process']],on='Word',how='left')

final_df = pd.concat([
    final_df,
    sub_processes])

final_df = final_df.merge(definition_df[['Word','Definition']].rename(columns={'Definition':'Definition1'}),on='Word',how='left')
final_df['Definition'] = np.where(final_df['Definition'].notnull(),final_df['Definition'],final_df['Definition1'])
final_df.drop('Definition1',axis=1,inplace=True)
#final_df.reset_index(inplace=True)
#final_df.rename(columns={'index':'default_order'},inplace=True)

# Sorting
# Process - Has to be Alphabetical. Do not actually Care Order.
# Categorization - Based on Manually defined Order, imported from Objects_Manual.
# Words Matter when they are part of a process, generally when not then alphabetically preferred. 

# Merge in Process  Filter
proc_filter = manual_object_df[(manual_object_df['Process']=='Notes')&(manual_object_df['Categorization']=='Filter Order')][['Word','Order']].reset_index(drop=True).rename(columns={'Word':"Categorization",'Order':"proc_order"})
final_df = final_df.merge(proc_filter,on='Categorization',how='left')

# Merge in Word Order.
final_df = final_df.merge(manual_object_df.drop('Categorization',axis=1).rename(columns={'Order':'word_order'}),on=['Process','Word'],how='left')

final_df.sort_values(['Process','word_order','proc_order','Word'],inplace=True)
final_df.drop(['word_order','proc_order'],axis=1,inplace=True)
